title: Create Invisible Diving Gear
description: Ugh, that ugly netherite diving helmet? GONE! You can now see your pretty face :). Applies to copper and netherite diving helmet, chestplate and boots. However it does not remove the backtank model from your back.
body:
## What?
This resource pack removes the client-side visibility of Create's diving armor, it changes the model texture of the armor to completely blank.
I intend no disrespect to the artist(s) by calling the netherite diving helmet ugly within the resource pack's summary, what it is its just a little bit obstructive.
### Icon.
I felt like i needed to clarify that the icon contains textures and assets from multiple projects including:
[this](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ferns-fancy-inventory), [that](https://modrinth.com/mod/artifacts) and [this](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric).
Those assets and/or textures are not used in the resource pack itself, only in the modrinth and minecraft icon(s).
